title: The Challenge in Indian Higher Education
narration_text: India's higher education system educates over 40 million students. Despite the National Education Policy 2020 advocating for technology-integrated instruction, a gap exists. Many educators struggle with creating multimedia resources due to technical barriers.
visual_description: A map of India highlighting major universities and cities. A split screen shows an educator at a computer struggling with video editing software on one side and students in a classroom on the other.

title: The Potential of Video-Based Learning
narration_text: Video-based learning is highly effective for knowledge transfer. However, creating these resources requires skills in video editing, audio production, and content optimization. This creates an inequitable situation where only technically skilled instructors can utilize this tool.
visual_description: A dynamic graph showing the effectiveness of video-based learning. Cut to a frustrated educator trying to edit a video, with complex software tools appearing on screen.

title: Introducing the YouTube AI Agent Framework
narration_text: To address these challenges, we introduce a YouTube AI Agent framework. This multi-agent system simplifies educational video creation by automating complex processes and supporting multiple Indian languages.
visual_description: An animated diagram showing four interconnected agents labeled: Research Agent, Script Agent, Text-to-Speech Engine, and Video Creator.

title: Understanding the Framework's Components
narration_text: The framework includes a Research Agent that analyzes successful videos for effective patterns. A Script Agent then creates structured scripts based on these insights. Additionally, a Text-to-Speech Engine supports multiple Indian languages.
visual_description: Sequential animations: 1) The Research Agent analyzing video data; 2) The Script Agent generating a script; 3) The Text-to-Speech Engine converting text into speech in Hindi.

title: Demonstrating the Framework's Application
narration_text: We demonstrate the framework using Python programming pedagogy. Educators can now create professional-quality videos quickly, leveraging proven content patterns while maintaining their unique teaching style.
visual_description: A split-screen showing an educator creating a video with the AI framework on one side and students watching the final product in class on the other.

title: Impact and Conclusion
narration_text: By reducing technical barriers, this framework empowers educators to create engaging content efficiently. It supports NEP 2020's vision of quality education for all, especially in resource-constrained environments.
visual_description: A closing animation showing a diverse group of educators using the AI tool across various Indian regions, with students benefiting from improved learning experiences.
